title: Proteome profiling of s-nitrosylated synaptosomal proteins by isobaric mass tags.
author: Wijasa, Teodora S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Short communication Highlights • Protocol for quantitative proteomics of nitrosylation on synaptosomal proteins. • Identification of endogenous nitrosylation independent of induction by NO donors. • Use of iodoTMT sixplex mass tags for stable labeling, enrichment, identification, and multiplex quantitation. • Applicable on low amounts of sample material of mouse and human brain tissue.
